name: rps-league
description: A live Rock-Paper-Scissors league dashboard. Ingests game data from the Reaktor API, stores it in SQLite, and serves a React frontend with leaderboards, player stats, and data health monitoring.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix back" "npm run dev --prefix front"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix back && npm install --prefix front
